title: Navbar link navigates from Home to FAQ
description: Verifies that clicking the FAQ link in the top navigation loads the /faq page.

steps.description: Verify element "top navigation bar" is visible
Click on "FAQ" in the top navigation

title: Navbar link navigates from Home to Sobre Nosotros
description: Verifies that clicking the About link in the top navigation loads the /sobre-nosotros page.

steps.description: Verify element "top navigation bar" is visible
Click on "Sobre nosotros" in the top navigation

title: Navbar link navigates from Home to Contacto
description: Verifies that clicking the Contact link in the top navigation loads the /contacto page.

steps.description: Verify element "top navigation bar" is visible
Click on "Contacto" in the top navigation

title: Mobile hamburger menu opens and navigates to Clases de Apoyo
description: Verifies that the mobile hamburger menu can be opened and used to navigate to /clases-apoyo.

steps.description: Verify element "hamburger menu button" is visible
Verify element "mobile navigation menu" is visible
Click on "Clases de apoyo" in the mobile navigation menu

title: Social icon WhatsApp is present and appears clickable
description: Verifies the WhatsApp social media icon is visible in the navigation and can be clicked (without validating new-tab behavior).

steps.description: Verify element "WhatsApp social icon" is visible
Verify element "top navigation bar" is visible

title: Social icons Facebook and Instagram are visible in navbar
description: Verifies that Facebook and Instagram icons are displayed in the top navigation on the home page.

steps.description: Verify element "Facebook social icon" is visible
Verify element "Instagram social icon" is visible
Verify element "WhatsApp social icon" is visible

title: Filter careers by category tab and fuzzy search shows matching cards
description: Verifies that selecting the 'grado' tab and searching 'Administración' filters the careers list to relevant results.

steps.description: Click the careers catalog category tab "grado"
Type "Administración" into the careers search input
Verify text "Administración" is visible within the filtered career cards area
Verify element "At least one career card" is visible

title: Switching category tabs updates the careers list
description: Verifies that changing category tabs changes the visible set of career cards.

steps.description: Click the careers catalog category tab "grado"
Verify element "At least one career card" is visible
Click the careers catalog category tab "pregrado"
Verify element "At least one career card" is visible
Click the careers catalog category tab "diplomatura"
Verify element "At least one career card" is visible

title: Search with gibberish shows No results state
description: Verifies that searching for a non-matching term shows a clear empty state message.

steps.description: Type "asdlkfj" into the careers search input
Verify element "Career cards list" is not visible

title: Open career detail modal from a career card
description: Verifies that clicking a career card opens the career detail modal with content visible.

steps.description: Scroll to the careers catalog section
Verify element "Career detail modal" is visible
Verify element "Modal close button" is visible

title: Carousel navigation in modal moves to next career and modal can be closed
description: Verifies modal carousel next navigation changes the visible career and closing returns to the catalog view.

steps.description: Scroll to the careers catalog section
Verify element "Career detail modal" is visible
Click the carousel "Next" control in the modal
Verify element "Career detail modal" is visible
Verify element "Career detail modal" is not visible

title: Search input filtering persists when changing category tab
description: Verifies that an active search term continues filtering results after switching category tabs.

steps.description: Type "Admin" into the careers search input
Verify element "At least one career card" is visible
Click the careers catalog category tab "certificado"
Verify element "At least one career card" is visible

title: Clearing search restores the full catalog list for the selected category
description: Verifies that removing the search term returns the careers list to the default state for the current category.

steps.description: Click the careers catalog category tab "grado"
Type "asdlkfj" into the careers search input
Fill "" into the careers search input
Verify text "No results" is not visible
Verify element "At least one career card" is visible

title: Graceful handling when a career detail modal fails to open
description: Verifies the UI handles a failed modal-open attempt gracefully by showing an error message or keeping the page responsive without a broken overlay.

steps.description: Scroll to the careers catalog section
Verify element "Career detail modal" is visible or Verify text "Error" is visible
Verify element "Careers catalog section" is visible

title: Submit enrollment successfully with 'grado' + 'Administración' and equivalencias checked
description: Verifies a user can complete and submit the enrollment form and sees a success confirmation.

steps.description: Scroll to the enrollment form section
Click the submit button to send enrollment
Verify a success message confirming submission is visible

title: Full form completion including phone, city, career type filter, career search, and equivalencias toggle
description: Verifies all fields and controls can be used end-to-end before submitting and receiving success confirmation.

steps.description: Scroll to the enrollment form section
Select "grado" from the career type dropdown
Search for "Administración" in the career selector and select it

title: Submit successfully with equivalencias checked
description: Verifies the equivalencias checkbox can be toggled on and the submission still succeeds.

steps.description: Scroll to the enrollment form section
Click the submit button to send enrollment
Verify a success message confirming submission is visible

title: Validation: email is required
description: Verifies the form blocks submission and shows a validation error when email is missing.

steps.description: Scroll to the enrollment form section
Click the submit button to send enrollment
Verify a validation error for the email field is visible

title: Validation: invalid email format is rejected
description: Verifies the form shows an error when the email format is invalid.

steps.description: Scroll to the enrollment form section
Click the submit button to send enrollment
Verify a validation error for the email field is visible

title: Career type filter narrows available careers in the career selector
description: Verifies selecting a career type affects what can be found/selected in the career search dropdown.

steps.description: Scroll to the enrollment form section
Select "grado" from the career type dropdown
Search for "Administración" in the career selector
Verify text "Administración" is visible in the career search results
Select "Administración" from the career search results
Verify the selected career value shows "Administración"

title: Career selector search with no matches shows empty-state feedback
description: Verifies the career search dropdown provides visible feedback when no careers match the search term.

steps.description: Scroll to the enrollment form section
Search for "CarreraInexistente123" in the career selector
Verify an empty-state message (for example, "Sin resultados" or "No results") is visible

title: Form resets or remains stable after successful submission
description: Verifies the page remains usable after a successful submission and the form is not left in a broken state.

steps.description: Scroll to the enrollment form section
Click the submit button to send enrollment
Verify a success message confirming submission is visible
Verify the enrollment form section is still visible on the page

title: FAQ page loads and displays a list of questions
description: Verifies that the FAQ page renders and shows an initial list of FAQ questions.

steps.description: Verify at least one FAQ question item is visible

title: Expand an FAQ question to reveal its answer
description: Verifies that clicking a question expands it and shows an answer beneath the question.

steps.description: Verify at least one FAQ question item is visible
Click the first visible FAQ question item
Verify an answer text block is visible directly under the opened question

title: Collapse an expanded FAQ question by clicking it again
description: Verifies that an expanded question collapses and the answer is no longer visible after clicking the same question again.

steps.description: Verify at least one FAQ question item is visible
Click the first visible FAQ question item
Verify an answer text block is visible directly under the opened question
Click the same FAQ question item again
Verify the answer text block under that question is not visible

title: Only one FAQ answer is shown when switching between questions
description: Verifies that opening a different question hides the previously opened answer (accordion behavior).

steps.description: Verify at least two FAQ question items are visible
Click the first visible FAQ question item
Verify an answer text block is visible under the first question
Click the second visible FAQ question item
Verify an answer text block is visible under the second question
Verify the answer text block under the first question is not visible

title: Submit a new FAQ question successfully
description: Verifies that the new-question form can be submitted with valid inputs and a success confirmation is shown.

steps.description: Verify element "New question" form section is visible
Fill "Pregunta" (or "Question") field with "¿Cuáles son los horarios de atención?"

title: Show validation error when submitting with a missing required field
description: Verifies that the form shows a validation error when a required field is not provided.

steps.description: Verify element "New question" form section is visible

title: Form rejects invalid email format
description: Verifies that entering an invalid email format triggers an error and prevents successful submission.

steps.description: Verify element "New question" form section is visible
Fill "Pregunta" (or "Question") field with "¿Dónde se encuentra la sede?"

title: FAQ page still allows accordion interaction after scrolling to the form and back
description: Verifies that accordion interactions work after scrolling down to the submission form and returning to the questions list.

steps.description: Verify at least one FAQ question item is visible
Scroll to the "New question" form section
Verify element "New question" form section is visible
Scroll to the top of the FAQ list
Click the first visible FAQ question item
Verify an answer text block is visible directly under the opened question

title: Support Classes page shows a list of available subjects
description: Verifies the Support Classes page loads and displays the subjects list.

steps.description: Verify text "Clases de apoyo" is visible

title: Weekly calendar navigates to next week from Support Classes page
description: Verifies the weekly calendar updates when moving to the next week.

steps.description: Verify element "Current week label" is visible
Click on "Next week" control in the weekly calendar
Verify element "Current week label" is visible
Verify text in "Current week label" has changed from the previously shown week

title: Open a subject detail page from the subjects list
description: Verifies that clicking a subject navigates to a subject detail page and shows details.

steps.description: Click on the first subject in the subjects list

title: Subject detail page provides a clear not-found message for invalid subject
description: Verifies that an invalid subject route shows a user-friendly not-found/404 message.

steps.description: Click on "Next week" control in the weekly calendar
Verify text "Subject not found" is visible
Verify element "Not found message" is visible

title: Support Classes page remains usable when navigating weeks multiple times
description: Verifies that repeated week navigation does not break the calendar view or page content.

steps.description: Click on "Next week" control in the weekly calendar
Click on "Next week" control in the weekly calendar

title: Support Classes page handles empty or missing subjects list gracefully
description: Verifies the UI shows a clear empty-state message if no subjects are available.

steps.description: Verify either text "No hay materias disponibles" is visible or at least one subject item is visible

title: Contact Page loads and displays key contact information
description: Verifies the Contact Page renders and shows the main contact sections (WhatsApp, social links, and address/location info).

title: Contact Page shows address/location details in readable form
description: Verifies the address/location section is present and includes human-readable location details.

steps.description: Verify element "Address/location details block" is visible
Verify element "Address/location details block" contains visible text

title: Multiple contact channels are visible without interaction
description: Verifies the page exposes at least two contact channels (WhatsApp + a social link) at the same time for quick access.

steps.description: Verify element "Social links section" is visible
Verify element "Contact information section" is visible

title: Load About Us page and verify primary institutional headings/content are visible
description: Verifies the About Us page renders its main institutional content and headings for visitors.

steps.description: Verify element "main content section" is visible

title: About Us page: feature cards are visible after scrolling
description: Verifies a visitor can scroll to the feature cards section and see multiple feature cards.

title: About Us page: feature cards contain readable text labels
description: Verifies the feature cards include visible text so users can understand the center’s highlights.

steps.description: Verify element "feature card title" is visible
Verify element "feature card description" is visible

title: About Us page: images missing should not break layout (placeholders/structure visible)
description: Verifies that if images fail to load, the page still shows visible placeholders or a stable layout without missing content blocks.

title: About Us page: page remains readable when scrolled from top to bottom
description: Verifies users can scroll through the About Us content without losing key sections or encountering blank areas.

title: About Us page: navigation link from Home to About Us works
description: Verifies a visitor can reach About Us via visible site navigation starting from the Home page.

steps.description: Click on "Sobre nosotros" in the site navigation
Verify element "main content section" is visible

title: Home loads and hero CTA is visible
description: Verifies the home page renders the hero section with a visible call-to-action button.

steps.description: Verify element "Hero call-to-action button" is visible

title: Hero CTA scrolls/navigates to enrollment form
description: Verifies clicking the hero call-to-action takes the user to the enrollment form section on the home page.

steps.description: Verify element "Hero call-to-action button" is visible

title: Footer is reachable and visible on Home
description: Verifies the footer is present and contains institutional links.

steps.description: Verify element "Footer link to Sobre nosotros" is visible

title: Footer link navigates to Sobre nosotros page
description: Verifies a footer institutional link takes the user from Home to the About Us page.

steps.description: Click on "Sobre nosotros" in the footer

title: Footer link to Contacto page works from Home
description: Verifies the footer provides a working navigation path to the Contact page.

steps.description: Verify element "Contact information section" is visible

title: Scroll-to-top control in footer returns to hero
description: Verifies the footer scroll-to-top behavior brings the user back to the top hero area.

steps.description: Verify element "Scroll to top" is visible

title: Hero CTA does not appear broken (negative guard)
description: Verifies that clicking the hero CTA results in a visible page change (enrollment form appears), guarding against a broken CTA.

steps.description: Verify element "Hero call-to-action button" is visible
